annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Layout management: CRUD, screen and virtual-desktop assignments, quick layout slots (1-9), KDE Activities, and editor launch.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns the settings-based DEFAULT layout as JSON (id, name, zones, etc.). Note this is the persisted default, which may differ from the transient internal active layout — subscribe to activeLayoutIdChanged for the latter.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Full layout as JSON (id, name, zones, etc.).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns an array of strings; each element is one JSON-serialized layout object (manual layouts enriched with origin/visibility/allow-lists, plus autotile algorithm entries). Never bare IDs and never a single JSON array.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Array of JSON-serialized layout objects, one per string.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Source-agnostic list of renderer-ready previews across manual zone layouts and autotile algorithms. Each entry is a PhosphorLayout::LayoutPreview serialised to JSON (id, displayName, zones[]{x,y,width,height}, isAutotile, optional algorithm{...} metadata for autotile entries). Renderers consume uniformly without branching on the underlying source. Returns '[]' when no source is wired (early startup).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Source-agnostic preview for a single entry. id must match one returned by getLayoutPreviewList. windowCount is honoured by autotile sources (algorithm runs at that count); manual sources ignore it. Returns '{}' when id is unknown or no source is wired.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Preview id (manual layout UUID with braces, or 'autotile:<algorithmId>').

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Window count to render autotile algorithms with. Ignored by manual sources.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: LayoutPreview serialised to JSON, or '{}' if not found.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns a specific layout by ID as JSON. Empty string if not found.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Full layout as JSON, or empty if not found.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Switch to the layout with the given UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Apply quick layout slot (1-9) for the given mode to the given screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Create a new empty layout. Returns the new layout UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Permanently delete the layout with the given ID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Create a copy of an existing layout. Returns the new layout UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: UUID of the new layout copy.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Import a layout from a JSON file. Returns the imported layout UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Absolute path to the JSON file.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Export a layout to a JSON file at the given path. Returns whether the export was written.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True when the layout reached the destination. False when it could not be opened, written or committed; the destination is left untouched in that case.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set whether a layout is hidden from the zone selector.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True to hide from zone selector.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set whether a layout auto-assigns new windows to empty zones.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set a layout's aspect-ratio class (which monitor shapes it targets).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Replace an existing layout with the supplied full layout JSON (editor save path). The layout's UUID is taken from the JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if the layout was updated.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Create a new layout from the supplied full layout JSON (editor new-layout save, KZones import).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: UUID of the created layout, or empty string on failure.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Launch the layout editor for the active layout.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Launch the layout editor for the layout assigned to the given screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen to edit layout for (e.g. DP-1).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Launch the layout editor for a specific layout, optionally targeting a screen for geometry/name matching.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen to open on (empty = editor default).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Return current mode, layout, and algorithm for all screens as a JSON array: one object per screen with screenId, virtualDesktop, activity, mode (0=Snapping, 1=Autotile), layoutId, layoutName, algorithmId, algorithmName.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON array of per-screen state objects.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the layout currently in use on a screen (resolves with current virtual desktop and activity context).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Assign a layout to a screen for all virtual desktops.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Remove the layout assignment from a screen.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Batch set all base screen assignments (saves once). Clears existing base assignments first.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get layout for a specific screen and virtual desktop (1-based).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Assign layout to a specific screen and virtual desktop.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Clear layout assignment for a screen/desktop combination.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if there is an explicit assignment (not inherited) for this screen/desktop.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the current mode (0=Snapping, 1=Autotile) for a screen/desktop.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the snapping layout UUID for a screen/desktop (regardless of current mode).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the tiling algorithm ID for a screen/desktop (regardless of current mode).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Batch set all per-desktop assignments (saves once). Canonical key format: 'screenId|desktopNumber' ('screenId:desktopNumber' is accepted as a legacy fallback but misparses virtual-screen ids — do not emit it).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns the number of virtual desktops.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns the names of all virtual desktops.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns the daemon's effective screen ids — one entry per physical monitor PLUS any virtual-screen subdivisions configured on top. Use this for screen enumeration in UI / settings panels; getAllScreenAssignments is the assignment-state readback and emits only screens with stored entries.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Stable screen ids in manufacturer:model:serial form (e.g. 'Dell:U2722D:115107' for physical, 'Dell:U2722D:115107/vs:0' for virtual subdivisions). Order follows the daemon's effective-screen iteration.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns all screen-to-layout assignments as JSON. The JSON is a view of *stored* assignment state (suitable for round-trip back through setAllScreenAssignments) — synthesized level-1 global-default fallbacks are deliberately NOT serialized, so callers that need the resolved mode for an unconfigured screen must use the per-context lookup methods instead. Only screens with at least one stored entry (base or per-desktop) appear; for screen enumeration use getAvailableScreenIds.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: JSON object keyed by connector name, containing one entry per screen with stored assignments. Each entry includes {"screenId": <stable-id>}. Screens with an explicit base-level assignment additionally include {"default", "snappingLayout", "tilingAlgorithm", "mode"}; screens with explicit per-desktop assignments include numeric-string keys ("1", "2", …) mapping to the assigned layout id. Screens with no stored entries are omitted entirely — DO NOT use this method to enumerate available screens; call getAvailableScreenIds instead.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the layout ID assigned to a quick slot (1-9) for the given mode.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Assign a layout to a quick slot (1-9) for the given mode.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Layout UUID to assign (empty to clear).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Batch set all quick layout slots for the given mode (saves once).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Map of slot number (as string) to layoutId.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get all quick layout slot assignments for the given mode.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Map of slot number (as string) to layoutId.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get the current virtual desktop number (1-indexed). Returns 0 if unavailable.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Current virtual desktop number (1-based), or 0 if unavailable.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if KDE Activities are available.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns the list of activity IDs.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns activity metadata as JSON for the given activity ID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Returns metadata for all activities as JSON.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get layout for a screen and activity (any desktop).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Assign layout to a screen and activity.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Clear layout assignment for a screen/activity combination.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True if there is an explicit assignment for this screen/activity.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Batch set all per-activity assignments (saves once). Key format: 'screenId|activityId' (legacy ':' fallback accepted).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Batch set all per-(screen,desktop,activity) Combined assignments (saves once). Key format: 'screenId|virtualDesktop|activityId'. Pure-Activity, pure-Desktop and Monitor-only rules are not touched.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get all per-(screen,desktop,activity) Combined assignments. Returns ONLY rules with all three dimensions pinned.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Get layout for screen, virtual desktop, and activity.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Assign layout to screen, desktop, and activity.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Set a complete assignment entry (mode + snapping layout + tiling algorithm) for a screen/desktop/activity context. Settings app sends one full entry per staged context during save.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Suppress screenLayoutChanged signals while the settings app replays a batch of assignment mutations during save. Always paired: setSaveBatchMode(true) before the batch, setSaveBatchMode(false) after.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: True to enter batch mode, false to leave it.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Trigger resnap/retile + OSD after a batch of assignment changes. Settings app calls this once after all setAssignmentEntry/clear calls complete.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the daemon has fully initialized and is ready. Clients (KCM, KWin effect) should wait for this before querying layouts.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the internal active layout changes. Carries the transient active-layout UUID, which may differ from getActiveLayout()'s settings-based default.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: UUID of the newly active layout.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when quick layout slots are modified, so the settings panel can refresh its slot assignments.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted after applyAssignmentChanges finishes a KCM save batch, listing the screens whose assignments changed.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Screen IDs whose assignments were modified in the batch.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the current KDE Activity changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the list of activities changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the number of virtual desktops changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted on structural layout mutations (editor save, updateLayout, createLayoutFromJson). Carries the full layout JSON payload. Scalar property mutations (hidden, autoAssign, aspectRatioClass) emit layoutPropertyChanged instead to avoid the full serialization.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Cheap context-switch notification: emitted alongside layoutChanged(json) on every active-layout switch, but carries only the layout UUID instead of the full JSON payload. Subscribers that re-load from disk (e.g. the editor) can bind to this signal and ignore the heavier layoutChanged emit.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: UUID of the newly active layout.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Compact per-property change notification. Replaces layoutChanged(json) for setLayoutHidden, setLayoutAutoAssign, and setLayoutAspectRatioClass. Subscribers that want the full shape should pull it via getLayout(layoutId) — the adaptor's cache is invalidated before the signal fires.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: New value as a variant (bool or int).

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when the list of layouts changes.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a new layout is created (createLayout, createLayoutFromJson, duplicateLayout, importLayout). Carries the new layout's UUID.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: UUID of the newly created layout.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a layout is deleted. Carries the UUID of the deleted layout.

annotation.name: org.gtk.GDBus.DocString
annotation.value: Emitted when a screen's layout assignment changes.
